title: 1 step DFU - Content of the Software Update tab when there is update available only for Earbuds
scenario: Software Update tab shows earbud firmware versions, release notes, and Update button while charging case is marked up to date when only earbud update is available
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device (earbuds + charging case) is connected.
Observe the displayed content when a firmware update is available only for the earbuds (not the charging case).
expected: The Software Update tab shows: current and available firmware versions for the earbuds, release notes for the update, and an Update button. The charging case is marked as 'Up to date'.
